key.name: H_TAIL_TYPE
key.note: 4=DDFP CCW; tells ArduPilot GB4008 on output 4 provides yaw by varying throttle

key.name: SCR_ENABLE
key.note: 1=Lua scripting on; rawes.lua is loaded and running after boot

key.name: ARMING_CHECK
key.note: 0=prearm checks disabled; required for Lua arming:arm() to succeed

key.name: BRD_SAFETY_DEFLT
key.note: 0=safety switch disabled; servo outputs are live immediately on boot

tail_pid.name: H_YAW_TRIM
tail_pid.note: feedforward throttle added to I-term output to compensate rotor drag at cruise RPM

tail_pid.name: ATC_RAT_YAW_P
tail_pid.note: yaw rate P gain; scales measured yaw rate error into throttle correction. Tuning starting point -- raise only if response is sluggish on a real disturbance.

tail_pid.name: ATC_RAT_YAW_I
tail_pid.note: yaw rate I gain; disabled while characterizing P alone (one-sided actuator + asymmetric integrator makes I aggressive). After P is settled, re-enable at ~P/10 (~0.0015) to remove steady-state drift.

tail_pid.name: ATC_RAT_YAW_D
tail_pid.note: yaw rate D gain; zero -- D is too noisy on this airframe to be useful

tail_pid.name: ATC_RAT_YAW_IMAX
tail_pid.note: I-term clamp (0-1 throttle scale); must exceed equilibrium throttle ~0.485

tail_pid.name: H_RSC_MODE
tail_pid.note: 1=setpoint mode; CH8 RC channel acts as motor interlock (2000=enabled)

tail_pid.name: H_RSC_RUNUP_TIME
tail_pid.note: seconds ArduPilot waits for motor to reach speed before allowing flight modes

tail_pid.name: SERVO4_MIN
tail_pid.note: minimum PWM sent to GB4008 ESC; 800 us = motor off / ESC armed

tail_pid.name: SERVO4_MAX
tail_pid.note: maximum PWM sent to GB4008 ESC; 2000 us = full throttle

tail_pid.name: SERVO4_TRIM
tail_pid.note: trim PWM = min for DDFP tail; ArduPilot outputs trim when disarmed

tail_pid.name: SERVO4_FUNCTION
tail_pid.note: 0=disabled so ArduPilot does NOT drive SERVO4; Lua mode 2 (yaw) writes SERVO4 directly via set_output_pwm_chan_timeout. AP's ATC_RAT_YAW PID still computes but has no output channel.
